title: Belgium vs New Zealand Box Score - June 27, 2026 - The Athletic
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
Belgium beat New Zealand to win World Cup group. Welcome to the party, Kevin De Bruyne

The Belgium team is waffling. Thank you. I’ll see myself out

Is anyone else hoping for wins by NZ and Egypt? I just think it would be great to see Australia v New Zealand at a World Cup that isn't cricket, rugby (either code) or netball.
